goal: Build a CAD-revision-drift fixture: same canonical built twice with subtly different fixture geometry (rev_a vs rev_b). Direct-eval verifies controller reaches success despite geometry drift. Realizes Phase 10 yrkesroll #17 (CAD/design-engineer persona).
thoughts: CAD-revision-drift = same logical fixture, different exact geometry. Models real-world CAD-revision churn.
Use create_arena_variant to spawn 2 variants of a fixture: rev_a (slightly larger), rev_b (slightly smaller).
Robot picks part from belt, inserts into either variant. Tests controller robustness to mm-level geometry shift.
Function-gate: cube delivered to fixture. Variant-A baseline; Variant-B regression-flag if controller fails.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.3, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)

# Fixture revision A: hole 5cm diameter
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Fixture", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.78], scale=[0.20, 0.20, 0.05])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Fixture", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_arena_variant(
    arena_path="/World/Fixture",
    variant_name="rev_a",
    description="Original CAD revision",
)

create_arena_variant(
    arena_path="/World/Fixture",
    variant_name="rev_b",
    description="Revised CAD: 2mm smaller hole",
)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.85], size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.10])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    drop_target=[0, -0.4, 0.86],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Fixture"],
)
extension_notes: CAD-engineer canonical. Variant set on /World/Fixture allows toggling between rev_a/rev_b. Direct-eval runs against both; gap reveals controller robustness. For canonical-build, rev_a is default.
failure_modes: create_arena_variant may not exist as expected handler
Variant geometry too similar — controller can't distinguish; gate passes both rev_a and rev_b
Bin position 0.85 above fixture is too close — bin floats
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Fixture", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.78], scale=[0.20, 0.20, 0.05])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Fixture", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_arena_variant(
    arena_path="/World/Fixture",
    variant_name="rev_a",
    description="Original CAD revision",
)

create_arena_variant(
    arena_path="/World/Fixture",
    variant_name="rev_b",
    description="Revised CAD: 2mm smaller hole",
)

create_bin(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, position={{primary_destination.position}}, size={{primary_destination.size}})

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_target=[0, -0.4, 0.86],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, "/World/Fixture"],
)
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; smoke-test ✓ 1/1 (33s); fixture variant scaffold; env_blocked: isaaclab_tasks — module 'isaaclab_tasks.envs' missing in current IsaacLab build
